assessment.note: Response indicates a lack of emotional impact from the achievement, reflecting disengagement.

new_queue.label: Team response to refactor
new_queue.name: How do you feel the team has responded to the payments refactor?
new_queue.description: Investigates perceptions of team dynamics and recognition of contributions.

new_queue.label: Mental space for growth
new_queue.name: Do you feel you have the bandwidth right now to take on mentoring responsibilities?
new_queue.description: Assesses current capacity for additional roles in relation to growth and wellbeing.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Upcoming projects
new_queue.name: What are your initial thoughts about getting involved in the billing rewrite?
new_queue.description: Gauges feelings about future responsibilities and potential contributions.

new_queue.label: Blockers insight
new_queue.name: Are there any current tasks where you're facing unexpected challenges?
new_queue.description: Prompts for discussion on specific obstacles that may not have been previously mentioned.

new_queue.label: Future clarity
new_queue.name: What would help you feel more prepared for the upcoming billing rewrite?
new_queue.description: Explores what information or support would enhance clarity and confidence going forward.
